title: Minimum Time Visiting All Points
titleCn: 访问所有点的最小时间

testcases.input: points = [[1,1],[3,4],[-1,0]] Output: 7 Explanation: One optimal path is [1,1] -> [2,2] -> [3,3] -> [3,4] -> [2,3] -> [1,2] -> [0,1] -> [-1,0] Time from [1,1] to [3,4] = 3 seconds Time from [3,4] to [-1,0] = 4 seconds Total time = 7 seconds
testcases.expectedOutput: 7 Explanation: One optimal path is [1,1] -> [2,2] -> [3,3] -> [3,4] -> [2,3] -> [1,2] -> [0,1] -> [-1,0] Time from [1,1] to [3,4] = 3 seconds Time from [3,4] to [-1,0] = 4 seconds Total time = 7 seconds
